disclaimer: External press references. Figures, valuations, and claims are as reported by the outlet and/or attributed to Shravan Bansal — not BRMSTE LTD financial statements. Coverage may reference entities distinct from BRMSTE LTD.

coverage.title: Metal Recycling can boost UK's economy like nothing else: Shravan Bansal
coverage.subject: Shravan Bansal
coverage.summary: CelebMix profiles Shravan Bansal on metal recycling as a lever for the UK economy — recycled ferrous and non-ferrous metals as a route to lower-cost materials, reduced emissions, and higher employment via secondary industry in OECD economies.
claims_as_reported: Metal recycling can save approximately 200 million tons of CO2 emissions per year.
The UK recycles around 12 million tons of metal each year.
BMRA members export ~80% of collected metal for processing elsewhere due to limited domestic recycling foundries.

theme_alignment.note: Thematic alignment of press coverage with the operator's brand; does not merge AD Leading Limited / Leading Metals with BRMSTE LTD.
